title: Grandi OX SmartHooks Round Wall Hooks, 3 Pack, Strong Hold 1kg, No Damage, White, 3 x 5 cm
features: STRONG HOLD: Features robust adhesive technology capable of supporting up to 1kg weight per hook, perfect for hanging various household items
DAMAGE-FREE: Removes cleanly from walls without leaving marks or residue, making it ideal for both homeowners and renters
EASY INSTALLATION: No tools or fixings required - simply peel and stick the hook to any clean, flat surface for immediate use
VERSATILE USE: Set includes 3 round white hooks, each measuring 3 x 5 centimetres, suitable for hanging towels, robes, or light decorative items
SMART DESIGN: Oval-shaped hooks feature a smooth, modern aesthetic with a practical curved design for secure item placement
description: Transform your living space with these innovative SmartHooks - the perfect solution for hassle-free wall organisation. Each pack contains three round, white hooks that offer exceptional holding power of up to 1kg per hook. The clever design features strong adhesive backing that ensures a secure hold without the need for drilling, nails, or other fixings. These 3 x 5cm hooks are ideal for renters and homeowners alike, as they can be removed cleanly without leaving marks or damaging your walls. Perfect for hanging coats, towels, keys, or decorative items in any room. The simple press-and-stick installation makes mounting effortless - simply clean the surface, peel off the backing, and press firmly into place. These versatile hooks work well on most smooth surfaces and can be easily repositioned when needed. The clean, minimalist design complements any décor whilst providing practical storage solutions for your everyday needs.
